title: lithocarpus pasania
intro: Lithocarpus pasania, also known as the Bur oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to the mountainous regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains tannins and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus pasania include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs and sore throats, and treat various skin conditions. Lithocarpus pasania can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine to create topical ointments and salves.
